title: schizoglossum cabrae
intro: Schizoglossum cabrae is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the "cabrae's tongue plant". Native to South Africa, this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Schizoglossum cabrae include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Schizoglossum cabrae can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
